steps.title: Describe or Upload
steps.desc: Banana Pro AI offers two powerful creative modes: upload existing photos for image-to-image transformation, or describe your vision for text-to-image generation. Our AI image generator understands your creative intent.

steps.title: AI Processing
steps.desc: Banana Pro AI's advanced AI image generator instantly analyzes your input. Image-to-image converts your photos into artistic variations, while text-to-image creates original masterpieces from descriptions.

steps.title: Download & Use
steps.desc: Get your high-quality AI-generated images watermark-free, ready for commercial projects, social media, or personal creative work.

features.sectionDesc: At the heart of Banana Pro AI's creative capabilities. Our AI image generator offers dual functionality: image-to-image transforms existing photos through intelligent style transfer, while text-to-image creates stunning visuals from descriptions. Unlock creativity with features from auto background removal to advanced upscaling.

tabs.title: Text to Image
tabs.subtitle: Generate images from text
tabs.desc: Simply enter a text description and Banana Pro AI will transform your imagination into high-quality images. Supports multiple styles from realistic photography to anime illustration.

tabs.title: Image to Image
tabs.subtitle: Generate variations from reference
tabs.desc: Upload your reference image and Banana Pro AI will intelligently analyze and generate stylized variations. Preserve the original structure while adding entirely new artistic styles.

tabs.title: AI Portraits

tabs.desc: Generate high-quality portraits rivaling professional photography with Banana Pro AI. Supports various lighting styles and scene backgrounds for the perfect personal image.

tabs.title: AI Avatars

tabs.title: Style Transfer
tabs.subtitle: Switch artistic styles freely
tabs.desc: Banana Pro AI offers a rich library of artistic styles and professional preset templates. Easily customize intensity, combine styles, and seamlessly switch between photorealism and artistic expression.

tabs.title: Video Generation

items.title: Commercial Rights Included
items.desc: Fully own your creative output. Banana Pro AI provides complete commercial usage rights for every generated image at no extra cost. Use freely for client projects, advertising, social media, print materials, and more.

items.title: High-Resolution 4K Output
items.desc: Banana Pro AI generates images up to 4K resolution with rich detail and outstanding clarity. Perfect for digital and print applications with sharp details, natural colors, and realistic lighting.

items.title: Multiple Image Sizes
items.desc: Flexibly choose from multiple image sizes and aspect ratios: 1:1 square for social media, 16:9 widescreen for video covers, 4:5 portrait for Instagram, A4 for print, and more.

items.title: 30+ AI Models
items.desc: Harness the power of 30+ top AI models including Flux, Stable Diffusion, Midjourney, and more. Banana Pro AI offers the most comprehensive AI image generation model matrix in the industry.

items.q: What is Banana Pro AI and how does the AI image generator work?
items.a: Banana Pro AI is a cutting-edge AI image generation platform. Our AI image generator uses advanced machine learning models trained on millions of images to understand and create visual content. Simply provide a text description or upload a reference image, and our AI generates high-quality professional images in seconds.

items.q: How does Banana Pro AI's image generator work technically?
items.a: Banana Pro AI's AI image generator uses advanced deep learning models trained on massive datasets of images and descriptions. Image-to-image: upload an image and specify desired modifications. Text-to-image: provide a text description and the AI creates matching images from scratch.

items.q: How is Banana Pro AI different from other AI image generators?
items.a: Banana Pro AI stands out with 30+ top AI models, free commercial usage rights, 4K high-resolution output, and ultra-fast generation. We offer free credits with no credit card required to get started.

items.q: Can I use generated images commercially?
items.a: Absolutely! All images generated by Banana Pro AI come with full commercial usage rights at no extra cost. You can freely use them in client projects, advertising, social media, and print materials.

items.q: What image sizes and formats are supported?
items.a: Banana Pro AI supports multiple sizes: 1:1 square, 16:9 widescreen, 4:5 portrait, A4 print, and more. Output formats include PNG, JPEG, and WebP, with up to 4K resolution.

items.q: What are the limits for free users?
items.a: Free users receive a daily allocation of free generation credits and can access all basic models and features. Premium users enjoy more credits, priority queue, and advanced model access.

items.q: How do I get more generation credits?
items.a: You can get more credits by subscribing to a premium plan. We offer flexible monthly and annual plans for individual creators to enterprise teams.

items.q: How long does AI image generation take?
items.a: Most images generate in 5-10 seconds. Complex images or high-resolution output may take slightly longer, but typically no more than 30 seconds.

cta.desc: Join millions of creators, marketers, and artists who trust Banana Pro AI as their go-to AI image generator. Turn your ideas into reality in seconds — completely free, forever.

sections.label: Advanced AI Engine
sections.imageAlt: Power your creativity with revolutionary AI
sections.heading: Power Your Creativity with Revolutionary AI
sections.body: Banana Pro AI leverages cutting-edge artificial intelligence technology for unprecedented image quality and generation speed. Our models are trained on vast visual concepts to realize your creative vision with outstanding fidelity.

sections.label: Creative Expression
sections.heading: Transform Inspiration into Visual Masterpieces
sections.body: From realistic photography to abstract art, from anime illustration to concept design — support for 30+ artistic styles with precise control over every creative detail. Your imagination is the only limit.

sections.label: Professional Output
sections.heading: High-Standard Output for Professional Workflows
sections.body: Support up to 4K resolution output with full commercial usage rights for all generated images. Whether for advertising, product showcases, or brand visuals, meet the strictest professional standards.

sections.label: Perfect Consistency
sections.heading: Unmatched Character & Style Consistency
sections.body: Building visual narratives requires stable characters and unified styles. Banana Pro AI excels at maintaining visual identity with an advanced memory system that remembers character features, artistic styles, and composition preferences.

sections.label: Two Powerful Modes
sections.imageAlt: Dual-mode creation system for every scenario
sections.heading: Dual-Mode Creation System for Every Scenario
sections.body: Whether creating from scratch or performing style transfer and editing on existing images, Banana Pro AI adapts perfectly. Text-to-image mode lets you get professional images through natural language descriptions.

sections.label: Forever Free
sections.imageAlt: Truly free forever with full commercial rights
sections.heading: Truly Free Forever with Full Commercial Rights
sections.highlight: Zero Cost to Start, No Hidden Fees
sections.body: Banana Pro AI promises forever-free basic features with no hidden restrictions. All images generated by free users come with full commercial licensing rights.
